name: Tab Master: MRU Switch, Rearrange & Position
description: All-in-one tab management: MRU tab switching (CLUT), tab rearranging with shortcuts, and control over where new tabs open.

quick-switch.description: MRU Quick Switch: cycle to last used tab (press rapidly to go further back)

normal-switch-forward.description: MRU Normal Switch: cycle through recently used tabs (forward)

normal-switch-backward.description: MRU Normal Switch: cycle through recently used tabs (backward)

move-tab-left.description: Move current tab one position to the left

move-tab-right.description: Move current tab one position to the right

move-tab-first.description: Move current tab to the first (leftmost/top) position

move-tab-last.description: Move current tab to the last (rightmost/bottom) position
